V0717_01_00_00_0.text:
Heh heh heh.
Hi. I'm Yuo.

V0717_01_00_01_0.text: It's time to begin my puppet show!

V0717_01_00_02_0.text: Let's have a performance for the ages!

V0717_01_00_03_0.text: You can't defeat me, but you're welcome to try.

V0717_01_00_04_0.text: It must be exciting for you that you get to lose against me.

V0717_01_00_05_0.text: Since I have a certain special card, I can't lose.

V0717_01_00_06_0.text:
Care to play?
Because my puppets want to play with you.

V0717_01_00_07_0.text: Goha Enterprises needs only one leader - me!

V0717_01_00_08_0.text: This is the beginning of the end for Rush Duels.

V0717_01_00_09_0.text: I already know everything about your Deck, Luke.

V0717_01_00_10_0.text: Goha needs only one President - and his name is Yuo!

V0717_01_00_11_0.text:
The Lukeman?
Why do I have to deal with this nonsense...

V0717_01_00_12_0.text: Why do I feel that this is one Duel I can't turn down...

V0717_03_00_00_0.text:
So far's been my opening act.
Now's when I truly shine!

V0717_03_00_04_0.text: You haven't seen the best part of my show yet!

V0717_03_00_05_0.text: My puppets will now put on their perfect performance!

V0717_05_00_00_0.text: The stronger my foe, the tougher I become!

V0717_07_09_00_0.text: Did you forget that I have this card?

V0717_07_09_01_0.text: This is the card I Set!

V0717_10_00_01_0.text: A round of applause for our next performer!

V0717_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0717_11_03_00_0.text: I remove my monster from the stage.

V0717_14_00_01_0.text:
Heh heh heh!
Time to battle!

V0717_21_00_00_0.text: You're like a puppet whose strings have been cut.

V0717_21_00_02_0.text: I believe I've figured out your strategy.

V0717_21_00_03_0.text: I'm the puppet master, so I'm always in control.

V0717_21_00_04_0.text:
You're not going to win, you know.
Because I'm Yuo Goha.

V0717_21_00_05_0.text: As long as I have a certain card, I'm still going to win.

V0717_28_00_00_0.text: My puppets put on a spectacular performance!

V0717_28_00_01_0.text: Stay tuned for my next show.

V0717_28_00_02_0.text:
I know you feel miserable.
And that makes me happy!

V0717_28_00_03_0.text: I rule Goha, and Goha rules all - including you!

V0717_28_00_04_0.text:
You’re a helpless puppet.
And I’m pulling the strings!

V0717_28_00_05_0.text: Can't be a president without leadership skills like mine.

V0717_28_00_06_0.text: Goha doesn't need six presidents, right Yuka?

V0717_28_00_07_0.text: The living is sealed in light...

V0717_29_00_00_0.text:
This can't be right...
This is unacceptable!

V0717_29_00_01_0.text:
Why!?
Why haven't your LP dropped to 0!?

V0717_29_00_02_0.text:
How can you defeat me!?
You're nothing compared to me!

V0717_29_00_03_0.text: This has gotta be a joke...

V0717_29_00_04_0.text: Everything was going to plan - until it didn't...

V0717_29_00_05_0.text: I shouldn't have underestimated my family...

V0717_29_00_06_0.text: I can't believe my sister defeated me...

V0717_29_00_07_0.text:
I've never had my LP drop to 0!
What happens now?

V0717_29_00_08_0.text: Someone other than me has that card!?

V0717_33_00_01_0.text: My puppets' effects will last forever!

V0717_33_00_02_0.text: You have no chance to win!

V0717_30_00_02_0.text: I'm the president - treat me with respect.

V0717_34_00_00_0.text: Why do I have to go deal with this?

V0717_34_00_01_0.text: I figured out who the sixth sibling is. It's you!

V0717_34_00_02_0.text: Pack up your stuff because you're fired!

V0717_34_00_04_0.text: That can't be a legal move! ...Can it?

V0717_34_00_05_0.text: Your odds of winning aren't 0%!? It has to be!

V0717_34_00_06_0.text: A meteor fell right into your Deck? That's impossible!

V0717_34_00_09_0.text: Are you playing me as a puppet?

V0717_34_00_10_0.text: I've never said thank you in my life, but... Thank you.

V0717_34_00_11_0.text: I will free your mind! The doomed will rise from the dark!

V0717_32_00_01_0.text:
Heh heh heh!
Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links!

V0717_35_00_00_0.text:
Heh heh heh!
I'm Yuo Goha - the best of the Goha Six!

V0717_35_00_01_0.text: When the dust settles, I, Yuo, will control all of Goha!

V0717_36_00_01_0.text: As the President, I order you to end them!

V0717_36_00_02_0.text: If you're going to fight, then fight!

V0717_36_00_04_0.text: I can tell you're only pretending to be my ally!

V0717_36_00_05_0.text: Stop playing around and finish them!

V0717_36_00_06_0.text: Since I'm so nice, I'll let you deal the finishing blow.

V0717_36_00_10_0.text: Time for a pitching change, Yuka.

V0717_36_00_12_0.text: I'm excited to see how you'll come back from this.

V0717_08_00_00_0.text:
Here comes the best part!
Fuuusionnnn!

V0717_08_00_01_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fuuusionnnn!

V0717_08_00_02_0.text: Seal the living in light so the doomed rises from the dark!

V0717_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Monster Reincarnation!

V0717_08_00_04_0.text: I activate the Field Spell, Imaginary Arc Tower!

V0717_08_00_04_1.text: This entire stage is now under my control!

V0717_08_00_05_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Imaginary Arc Turbo!

V0717_08_00_06_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Imaginary Arc Turbulence!

V0717_08_00_06_1.text: The rough winds will tear you apart!

V0717_08_00_07_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Imaginary Arc Turnback!

V0717_08_00_08_1.text: With this card, I Fusion Summon!

V0717_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Imaginary Arc Actor!

V0717_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Imaginary Arc Surge!

V0717_09_00_00_1.text: I destroy one of your Set cards!

V0717_09_00_01_0.text: I can select which of Metarion Ashurastar's effects to use!

V0717_09_00_01_1.text:
I choose to gain ATK!
Six Blade Upgrade!

V0717_09_00_02_0.text: I select Metarion King Cobrastar's first effect!

V0717_09_00_03_0.text: I activate Metarion King Cobrastar's second effect!

V0717_09_00_04_0.text: I activate Metarion Vritrastar's first effect!

V0717_09_00_05_0.text: I can select which of Vritrastar's effects to activate!

V0717_09_00_05_1.text:
I'll destroy your Dragons!
Tendril Termination!

V0717_09_00_06_0.text: I activate Metarion Herculestar's first effect!

V0717_09_00_07_0.text: I choose Metarion Herculestar's second effect!

V0717_09_00_08_0.text: I'll activate Metarion Ladonstar's first effect!

V0717_09_00_09_0.text: I select Metarion Ladonstar's second effect!

V0717_09_00_10_0.text: I activate Metarion Medustar's first effect!

V0717_09_00_11_0.text: I activate Metarion Medustar's second effect!

V0717_09_00_12_0.text: I activate Metarion Geniustar's first effect!

V0717_09_00_13_0.text: I activate Metarion Geniustar's second effect!

V0717_09_00_14_0.text: I activate Full Metarion Ashurastar's first effect!

V0717_09_00_15_0.text: I activate Full Metarion Ashurastar's second effect!

V0717_09_00_16_0.text: I activate Full Metarion Vritrastar's first effect!

V0717_09_00_17_0.text: I activate Full Metarion Vritrastar's second effect!

V0717_09_00_20_0.text: I activate Imaginary Leading Actor's effect!

V0717_09_00_21_0.text: I activate Phantasm Mask Master's effect!

V0717_37_00_00_0.text: When fate unites with destiny, new life is born!

V0717_13_00_02_0.text: Where might and mayhem combine, new life is born!

V0717_37_00_01_0.text: When fate unites with destiny, a perfect life is born!

V0717_13_00_09_0.text: She finds success where others only see defeat!

V0717_13_00_10_0.text: Welcome to the stage Gyakutenno Megami!

V0717_13_00_17_0.text:
Here's the star of my show!
Imaginary Actor!

V0717_19_00_02_0.text: Any light you have will be swallowed by the darkness!

V0717_19_00_02_1.text:
Metarion Vritrastar!
Finish 'em!
Drago Ex Machina!
